positive: A highly stylized, geometric illustration of a mountain landscape seen at sunrise. The composition features overlapping, clean silhouettes of peaks and stylized flora (pine trees, ferns) against a dramatic, gradient sky. The color palette uses deep indigo, burnt orange, warm yellow, and teal accents. The overall style is modern minimalist linework combined with bold color blocking, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Strong contrast, central focus, negative space utilization, symmetrical elements.
